en: I ain't holla, but I ain't gon' switch it, baby
ko: 난 소리치진 않지만, 바꿀 생각은 없어, 베이비

en: I'ma let you catch up with your game
Run faster, don't let him lose you
ko: 더 빨리 달려, 그가 너를 놓치지 않게

en: Cause I ain't gon' bless you
ko: 왜냐면 난 너에게 축복을 주지 않을 거니까

en: Unless you feel a little desperate
ko: 네가 조금 절박하게 느끼지 않는 한

en: Send a text message, girl
Stop, wait a minute
The way you move that girl
You done got my heart all in it
And I just wanna be with you tonight Girl, please
ko: 난 오늘 밤 너와 함께 있고 싶어, 제발

en: I'ma play it, yeah, it's true
But I changed the game for you
I wanna see what it do
Can I be free?
This is how I feel
I'm in need of love
So let's dip a bite of you
Ooh, you're just my type
Everything's so right
And I just wanna chill
So let's dip a bite of you
Let's dip a bite of you
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
ko: 아, 아, 아, 아, 아, 아, 아.

en: She's fine too
But I want you
